case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ELMER BERNALDO CANCHE YAM

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,273.92 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT YAM, ELMER BERNALDO CANCHE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD) AS TO DEFENDANT YAM, ELMER BERNALDO CANCHE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-04-2018 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 9/10/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO MAIL RECEPTACLE = UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JUL-22-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YAM, ELMER BERNALDO CANCHE
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
